request.title: ADR-030 schema live test
request.description: Single-writer test Mission exercising the ADR-030 schema fields (owner, hop_count, classification, correlation_id) through the real queued -> processing -> completed cycle on vlad74ai/ai-transport. Not a multi-writer/handoff test (no second live Orchestra participant in this session) — that remains untested.
request.expected_output: Mission reaches completed/ with schema-valid fields intact at every step.

commands.result: New ADR-030 schema fields (owner, hop_count, classification, correlation_id) survived a full queued->processing->completed cycle on the real ai-transport repo, verified by read-back after each write. Single-writer only — no cross-participant handoff, hop_count increment, loop-limit trigger, or schema-rejection path was exercised. Status: single-writer schema test PASSED. Multi-writer scenario still UNTESTED.

result.artifact: ADR-030 schema (schemas/mission.schema.json) confirmed usable in a real Mission lifecycle.

history.detail: owner=Claude unchanged, hop_count=0 unchanged (no handoff occurred)
Schema fields validated end-to-end, single-writer only
